summary: Unified the workspace into a single Engineer role, added Playwright MCP, and upgraded recall memory with user preference capture.
derived_updates: Archived Explorer, Logger, and Debugger into the legacy-agents archive and activated Engineer as the only active role.
Enabled local Playwright MCP alongside Oracle read-only MCP for more precise UI and app to DB analysis.
Added recall-index refresh and user-working-preferences memory so repeated interaction improves future runs.
